NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS AND OTHER APPROPRIATE EXTRAORDINARY RELIEF, IMMEDIATE RELIEF REQUESTED, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER SCOCCHERA, RICHARD HEARING SET FOR AUG-30-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WAS MADE. NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. PETITIONER RICHARD SCOCCHERA'S HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS DENIED; THE MOTION WAS NOTICED WITHOUT SUFFICIENT TIME AND WITHOUT AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME; IN ANY EVENT, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED HIS BURDEN OF SHOWING BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT REAL PARTY'S BALLOT DESIGNATION IS FALSE OR MISLEADING. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MINAL J. BELANI, TEL. NO. (408) 646-7707 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. NO OBJECTIONS WAS MADE. NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. PETITIONER RICHARD SCOCCHERA'S Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandamus IS DENIED; THE MOTION WAS NOTICED WITHOUT SUFFICIENT TIME AND WITHOUT AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME; IN ANY EVENT, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED HIS BURDEN OF SHOWING BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT REAL PARTY'S BALLOT DESIGNATION IS FALSE OR MISLEADING. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
